## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`fix(bot):`, `feat(cc):`)
- [ ] One concern per PR (no unrelated commits)
- [ ] Updated docs if user-facing behavior changed (README, .env.example)
- [ ] Considered both isolated mode (default) and shared mode (`BABATA_SHARED_CC=1`) if cc.py touched
